mnemonics: HARP: Human-Centric, Actionable, Responsible, Practical. Think of playing a harmonious harp to create user-focused AI.
keyPoints: Focus on solving a real human problem, not just showcasing technology
Design and evaluate with the end-user's needs and values at the core
Ensure the project is ethical, fair, and promotes human well-being
commonMistakes: Focusing too much on technical complexity rather than user benefit
Neglecting to involve real users in the design and testing phases
Overlooking ethical implications and potential biases in the AI system
